title: streblus insignis
intro: Streblus insignis, also known as the ironwood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, providing several health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Streblus insignis include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
